title: Filter
description: A filter expression that constrains event delivery to events matching specific criteria. Filters can use attribute equality, CESQL expressions, or composite logic (all, any, not).

dialect.description: Identifies the filter dialect. Use 'cesql' for CloudEvents SQL expressions, or 'exact'/'prefix'/'suffix' for simple attribute matching.

expression.description: The filter expression in the specified dialect. For CESQL, this is a SQL-like expression referencing CloudEvent attribute names.

filters.description: For composite filter dialects (all, any, not), the nested filters to evaluate.
